data.title: Why Is Vertex Pharmaceuticals Stock Trading Lower On Thursday After Back Pain Trial Data?
data.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals' suzetrigine reduced pain in Phase 2 trials for lumbosacral radiculopathy. Plans for Phase 3 trials follow regulatory discussions.
